## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Repository metadata/docs only
- [ ] `claude-supervision`
- [ ] `codex-supervision`
- [ ] `kimi-supervision`

## Verification

List commands run, or explain why a CLI-specific check was not run.

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, session artifacts, or local logs are included.
- [ ] Examples use portable paths rather than personal absolute paths.
- [ ] Runtime behavior changes are documented in the affected `SKILL.md`.
